Here the total number of benefic dots is 56. You see in this
chart seven houses with more than four benefic dots each.
Though Janmarasi is not good for Jupiter's transit, yet in this
chart it happens to be his own house and in addition to that it
contains 5 benefic dots. His exaltation too must produce ex-
cellent results for the same reason. Even the Sth house which
